title: Support Form
description: RJSF form schema for the help-and-support modal. Captures the user-input fields of the canonical SupportRequest construct (meshery/schemas/constructs/v1beta1/support/api.yml). Field shape, types, enums, and required list MUST stay a subset of SupportRequest; the Go validator at validation/forms_test.go enforces that.

subject.title: Subject
subject.description: Enter a concise and descriptive title for your support request. This will help us quickly understand the nature of your inquiry.

message.title: Description
message.description: Please provide a detailed description of your issue or question. Include any relevant information that will help us assist you more effectively.

scope.title: Scope of Questions
scope.description: Select the category that best represents the nature of your inquiry.
